## Completed Cycle Gate

The remaining productive no-approval work is to package the unbuilt warband visual roles from `KIT_GIA_BloodAxeWarband_A01` without touching DCC, Unreal, source concepts, AI, combat, encounter design, loot, or final visual approval.
